mod_design_use: Read active patron mirrors, patron state, origin, debug flags, and future state-track globals
caution: Use globals as CK-readable mirrors only.

mod_design_use: Gate effects by Health/Magicka/Stamina, skills, resistances, or AI values
caution: Actor values can include modifiers; know current vs base semantics.

mod_design_use: Contextual favors when low health/magicka/stamina
caution: Avoid effects that create noisy on/off flicker.

mod_design_use: Compare underlying actor value when modifiers should not count
caution: Use sparingly; player-facing state usually sees modified values.

mod_design_use: Gate guild, civil war, Thalmor, Vigilant, Blood-Kin, or hold privileges
caution: Faction records and ranks need local extraction.

mod_design_use: Ranked faction progression and community standing
caution: Rank semantics vary by faction.

mod_design_use: NPC relation and dialogue gates
caution: Can be broad; prefer specific factions for mod logic.

mod_design_use: Race/origin conditions where current race is sufficient
caution: Culture/religion mods should prefer stored origin over current race when transformations can distort identity.

mod_design_use: NPC dialogue flavor and race resonance
caution: Current race can be vampire/beast-form distorted.

mod_design_use: Actor, magic, object, or location semantic gates
caution: Keywords do nothing alone; behavior depends on consuming system.

mod_design_use: Amulet, armor, clothing, or taboo-equipment gates
caution: Keyword coverage across modded gear needs compatibility consideration.

mod_design_use: Temple, hold, dungeon, wilderness, home, city, sacred-place filters
caution: Location keyword coverage should be extracted locally.

mod_design_use: Quest alias location gates for receiver quests
caution: Alias fill and quest priority matter.

mod_design_use: Check current location membership
caution: Validate exact condition availability in CK before build.

mod_design_use: Detect active blessing, disease, neglect, curse, or status effect
caution: Spell absorption/dispels and hidden effects can complicate assumptions.

mod_design_use: Check abilities, powers, diseases, or granted spells
caution: Use for coarse spell ownership, not magnitude/tier by itself.

mod_design_use: Gate quest milestone signals or dialogue
caution: Quest stage meaning is per quest and must be curated.

mod_design_use: One-shot quest completion or milestone checks
caution: Use to prevent repeated signal awards.

mod_design_use: Major questline completion rewards or penalties
caution: Some quests are radiant/repeatable; verify before using.

mod_design_use: Hold-level civic standing and Imperial/justice pressure
caution: Bounty is reported crime, not hidden sin.

mod_design_use: Violent-crime pressure and murder/assault response
caution: Requires crime faction context.

mod_design_use: Theft/trespass/nonviolent civic pressure
caution: Can reflect gameplay style rather than theology by itself.

mod_design_use: Dawn, night, moon, prayer windows, shrine rituals
caution: Prefer central dawn processing for persistent state.

mod_design_use: Calendar-themed rituals or weekly caps
caution: Use only if player-facing reason is clear.

mod_design_use: Nocturnal/Mephala stealth context and debug display
caution: Sneaking is state, not success.

mod_design_use: Combat-only favors and anti-exploit gates
caution: Use with hostile/target checks.

mod_design_use: Hostility validation for kill/combat signals
caution: Runtime validation should remain in router/EventBus for scoring.

mod_design_use: Story Manager kill-event discrimination
caution: Payload behavior needs runtime proof per receiver.

mod_design_use: Follower-commanded crime/kill attribution
caution: Do not score indirect attribution until explicitly designed.

mod_design_use: Story Manager event payload conditions
caution: Payload names and types must be verified for each SM event.
